HGSS.016.0000:
A Recruitment Message arrived
from a Pokémon Ranger.

You may receive a [FF00,0001]MANAPHY Egg[FF00,0000]
from the Pokémon Ranger!

On the next screen, select
[FF00,0001]CONNECT TO POKéMON RANGER[FF00,0000].
Touch the screen to advance.
HGSS.016.0001:
A Mystery Gift signal has
been located!

You may receive a Mystery Gift!

At the next screen, select
[FF00,0001]Mystery Gift[FF00,0000].
Touch the screen to advance.
HGSS.016.0002:
A Recruitment Message arrived
from a Pokémon Ranger.

However, to communicate with the
Pokémon Ranger, you must get
further into your adventure and
obtain a Pokédex first.
Touch the screen to advance.
